goal: hedge my btc drawdown with demo first

steps.summary: Summarize balance, positions, fee drag, and concentration.
Read market state, volatility, and funding context.
Generate hedge alternatives and choose the least destructive protection path.
Block unsafe writes and enforce demo-first or approval rules.
Translate approved proposal into official okx CLI intents.
Save trace for audit and future review.

facts: Concentration risk should be computed before proposing a hedge.
Market context should be read before any execution proposal.
Write operations should be delegated to official executor only.

proposals.name: light-perp-hedge
proposals.reason: Fast downside protection with low upfront cost.

proposals.name: protective-put
proposals.reason: Capped downside with known premium expense.
cliIntents: okx option place --instId BTC-USD-260327-90000-P --side buy --ordType market --sz 1 --profile demo --json
